request_text: Fix the three issues surfaced in the mission review for task-workflow-bug-fixes-01KV69BZ. (1) BLOCKING Gate 2: tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/agent/test_map_requirements_spec_path.py is missing a module-level pytestmark marker — add 'import pytest' and 'pytestmark = [pytest.mark.fast]' (or whichever marker fits; check pytest.ini for available markers and what nearby test files in the same directory use). (2) Non-blocking RISK-1: the existing test only calls primary_feature_dir_for_mission directly; FR-005 requires a test that exercises the map_requirements CLI path. Add a second test in the same file that invokes the map_requirements command via typer CliRunner (or equivalent) with a tmp_path repo containing a coord worktree and spec.md only in the primary checkout, asserting the command exits 0 and produces a valid JSON result — do not remove the existing test, add a companion test. (3) Non-blocking architectural baseline shrinkage: tests/architectural/_baselines.yaml has 'test_no_dead_modules.category_7_grandfathered_orphans: 7' but current count is 6 — update the baseline to 6 to lock in the improvement. After each change, run the relevant tests to confirm green: pytest tests/architectural/test_pytest_marker_convention.py for (1), pytest tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/agent/test_map_requirements_spec_path.py for (2), pytest tests/architectural/test_ratchet_baselines.py for (3). Commit each fix separately with a clear message. Work in the current checkout (branch pr/task-workflow-bug-fixes-01KV69BZ).
